title: The Infinite Flow Activation
subtitle: A five-part money ritual for releasing income ceilings and opening to unlimited inflow.
excerpt: The Week 5 ritual from the MONEY Journal program. Five sequential steps: prepare, release, allow, integrate, anchor. The ritual works with the belief that income has a ceiling.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Week 5 ritual in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom and Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Release/allow structure from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

content.text: The Week 5 ritual from the MONEY Journal program. Five sequential steps designed to be done once at the start of the week. You will need a pen and paper for the anchor step.
Sit in stillness for a moment. Breathe slowly. Picture a wide river of light representing money and opportunity, flowing toward you, steady and without interruption.
I am ready to release all limits, ceilings, and restrictions on how and when money can flow to me. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow unlimited, effortless income from many sources. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.

Take one slow, full breath in, and all the way out. Let any held tension release on the exhale. Return to the picture of the river: wider now, flowing steadily through your life. Not dramatic, just more than before.
Write the sentence below in your own handwriting. Say it aloud as you write it.
This week, I am grateful that income and opportunity keep arriving in my world.

Adapted from the Week 5 ritual in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom and Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release/allow structure is the core method of The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
